oking for a gift for someone and I'm not sure what to pick — can you help?

Hi! Yes, absolutely. For denim gifts, a good place to start is our Shop All page: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/collections/shop-all and our Denim collection: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/collections/denim.

If you want an easy pick, the Meg fit is one of our best sellers. If you want something more personalized, our Fit Quiz can help narrow it down: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/pages/fit-quiz

turns.q: My budget is moderate — what would make a good gift in that range?
turns.replyTail:
ollections/shop-all

If you want to stay on the more affordable side, our Tops Under $40 collection is a great option: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/collections/tops-under-40

If denim feels like the better gift, our Denim collection is a good place to look, and the Meg fit is one of our best sellers: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/collections/denim

7:03 AM. You said:

Between your top two gift ideas, which feels more special?

07:03 AM

Of those two, denim feels more special. It is more gift-worthy than a basic top, and the Meg fit is one of our best sellers if you want a safer pick: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/collections/denim

If you want something easier for gifting, you can also send it through our Gift Instantly option so the recipient can choose their preferred size and color before it ships.

07:03 AM

turns.q: Is there a gift set or bundle that looks nicer than a single item?
turns.replyTail:
the nicest gifting option is usually a digital gift card, especially if you are not sure about size or fit: https://www.kutfromthekloth.com/products/gift-card

If you would rather gift an actual item, a more special-looking choice than a basic single piece would be a polished top or sweater paired with denim. A few nice options are the Coco Sweater Knit Top in White, the Yona Striped Knit Sweater in White/Blush, or the Carmen Sleeveless Top in Black, alongside one of our denim styles.

07:04 AM

turns.q: Can it arrive gift-ready, and how fast can it ship?
turns.replyTail:
ft-ready packaging details to share.

For shipping, please allow 3 to 4 business days for processing. After that, standard ground delivery in the continental U.S. takes 4 to 5 business days for orders under $49, and 7 to 10 business days for orders over $49. Orders under $150 have a flat shipping rate of $9.95, and shipping is free over $150.

If you need it faster, expedited orders placed before 10 AM PST ship the same day. Orders placed after 10 AM PST or on weekends can take longer.

07:04 AM
